definitions.description: Connect to the Atlassian MCP Server

properties.name: include
properties.description: How to select the tools you want to be exposed to the AI Agent

options.name: All
options.description: Expose every tool from the MCP server

options.name: Selected
options.description: Only expose the tools listed in "Tools to Include"

options.name: All Except
options.description: Expose all tools except those listed in "Tools to Exclude"

properties.name: includeTools
properties.description: Tools from the MCP server to expose to the agent. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

properties.name: excludeTools
properties.description: Tools from the MCP server to hide from the agent. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

options.name: timeout
options.description: Time in ms to wait for tool calls to finish

builderHint.searchHint: Agent-optimised Atlassian integration. When wiring an ai_tool to an AI Agent for Atlassian, use THIS node, not the native action node — this variant exposes Atlassian's tools in the shape AI Agents expect and ships pre-configured connection details.

definitions.name: @n8n/mcp-registry.atlassian
